caption: The video features an interview at MongoDB World 2022, held at the Javits Center in New York, NY. The speaker, Sanjeev Mohan, identified as the Principal of SanjMo, is seen speaking to the camera with a professional demeanor. He is dressed in a dark suit and appears to be engaged in a discussion about topics related to MongoDB or technology. The background shows a bustling environment with several people walking around, some carrying equipment, suggesting a busy conference setting. The lower third graphics display the event name, hashtag, and sponsorship by MongoDB, along with the location and the speaker's name and title. The overall atmosphere conveys a sense of professionalism and industry engagement.
